The '''Ahlenn system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Vodilux sector]].<ref name="Twinkle" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Ahlenn]]<ref name="SFD" /> and [[Phaylenn]].<ref name="Twinkle" />
